tasks.label: 🌥️ Claude - Kimi Cloud (Ollama fallback)
tasks.command: export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="http://localhost:11434" && export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="ollama" && export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="" && claude --model kimi-k2.5:cloud

tasks.label: 🌌 Grok 4.1 Fast - Reasoning (Cheap & Good for Coding)
tasks.command: unset ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN ANTHROPIC_API_KEY && export XAI_API_KEY="${env:XAI_API_KEY}" && claude --model grok-4-1-fast-reasoning
